indicators.name: Dining Table
indicators.rationale: The dining table can be used as a workspace.

indicators.name: Chair
indicators.rationale: The chairs around the dining table can be used for sitting while working.

indicators.name: Ceiling

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for computer work (solo) due to the presence of a dining table and chairs, but the low ceiling could be a limitation.
